item.title: PRO/AH/EDR> Avian influenza (57): Americas (USA) HPAI H5N1, poultry
item.description: Highly pathogenic avian influenza H5N1 detected in poultry in the United States.

item.title: PRO> Measles update (12): Europe, vaccination
item.description: Update on measles cases across Europe with focus on vaccination gaps.

item.title: PRO/AH> Rabies (03): Asia (India), dog, human exposure
item.description: Rabies cases in dogs with human exposure reported in India.
